name: Expandable Wooden Bathtub Tray Natural - Hearth & Hand™ with Magnolia
description:
Elevate your self-care routine with this Expandable Wooden Bathtub Tray from Hearth & Hand™ with Magnolia. Made of rubberwood and stainless steel for a natural look, this tray expands up to 27.5 inches long to fit the sides of your bathtub. It features a dedicated space to hold your drink, along with a gold-hue, collapsible book stand so you can read and relax while you soak. You can wipe this wooden tray clean with a dry cloth for easy upkeep after use.

Hearth & Hand™ with Magnolia: Gather • Create • Enjoy
